goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should have 'a star of 0'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '05:00'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get postcode and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the type of hotel
The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should have a star of 0
Make sure you get phone number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 05:00
Make sure you get contact number and car type
